series_metadata.series_title: Unclaimed and Abandoned Junk Vehicle Affidavit
series_metadata.series_description: In accordance with section 4513.60, 4513.62 and 4513.63 of the Ohio Revised Code, law enforcement agencies (as determined in accordance with standards fixed by the Registrar of Motor Vehicles) may request the owner to remove their vehicle that has been abandoned for fifteen days on public or private property. If the owner of the abandoned vehicle does not comply within fifteen days upon receipt of certified notification, the law enforcement agency shall obtain a salvage certificate of title from the Clerk of Court in any county. The affidavit (BMV 3701) contains the name and address of the owner, state, name and address of lienholder (if one), name and address of custodian, and the date. Distribution: Original - Clerk of Courts, Duplicate - Custodian, Triplicate - Law Enforcement Agency, Goldenrod - Title Division.
